blended.narrative: Crabbe Mountain is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.3 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 12 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 10 inches total.

Tuesday: light rain showers, highs of 54°F.
Saturday: 2.4" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
Sunday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect variable conditions.
